entities.old_man: an old man with white hair in a brown cardigan
entities.old_woman: an old woman with white curly hair in a lilac coat

scenes.title: The Park Bench
scenes.background_prompt: A park with a long green wooden bench under a large maple tree, a gravel path with fallen leaves, flower beds with roses in bloom, and a stone fountain visible in the distance. Autumn afternoon. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: An autumn afternoon in a park. A long green wooden bench sits under a large maple tree whose leaves are turning orange and gold. An old man with white hair in a brown cardigan sits on the left side of the bench, reading a thick book with reading glasses perched on his nose. The right side of the bench is empty. A folded lilac coat and a small wicker basket sit neatly on the right side of the bench seat, as if the person who placed them there stepped away briefly and will return. Fallen maple leaves in red and orange are scattered on the gravel path in front of the bench. Rose bushes in deep red bloom in the flower bed behind, and a stone fountain is faintly visible in the distance.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place old_man on the left side of the bench, sitting and reading a thick book with reading glasses on. Leave the right side of the bench empty — the old_woman (ghost entity) would appear here, seated beside him as usual, as if she has just stepped away.
